win_condition: After 4 rounds, the player with the most points wins.
tiebreaker: Player with most unused food tokens wins ties.

categories.label: Bird Card Points
categories.description: Face value victory points printed on each bird card played.

categories.label: Bonus Card Points
categories.description: Points earned from end-of-game bonus card objectives.

categories.label: End-of-Round Goal Points
categories.description: Points earned from the 4 end-of-round goal scoring.

categories.label: Eggs on Cards
categories.description: 1 point per egg on bird cards at end of game.

categories.label: Cached Food
categories.description: 1 point per food token cached on bird cards.

categories.label: Tucked Cards
categories.description: 1 point per card tucked under bird cards.
